samples.gvd:
module pe (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [31:0] a,
    input [31:0] b,
    output reg [31:0] c
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    
    if (rst) begin
        
        c <= 32'b0;
    end else begin
        
        c <= c + (a * b);
    end
end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="pe">
    <description>Multipling Accumulator for 32bit integer.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal. Defined as 1 for reset and 0 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="c" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the accumulated result.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Parallel Multiplier and Accumulator using Registers and Always Block.</implementation>
</module>
